testcase.name: Tool happy path — representative tools › case-converter — page loads, accepts input, produces output
Tool happy path — representative tools › case-converter — passes accessibility audit
Tool happy path — representative tools › base64-encoder — page loads, accepts input, produces output
Tool happy path — representative tools › base64-encoder — passes accessibility audit
Tool happy path — representative tools › uuid-generator — page loads, accepts input, produces output
Tool happy path — representative tools › uuid-generator — passes accessibility audit
testcase.error:
[chromium] › tool-happy-path.spec.ts:59:9 › Tool happy path — representative tools › uuid-generator — passes accessibility audit
Error: Accessibility violations found: aria-input-field-name (serious): Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name - .border-primary
at accessibility.ts:48
46 | }) 47 | .join('\n\n'); > 48 | throw new Error(`Accessibility violations found:\n${formatted}`); | ^ 49 | } 50 | expect(violations).toHaveLength(0); 51 | return; at checkAccessibility (/vercel/share/v0-project/tests/e2e/accessibility.ts:48:13) at /vercel/share/v0-project/tests/e2e/tool-happy-path.spec.ts:62:7
